commit_scope: Add a Tessera external witness adapter that checks the public GeoTessera/S3 surface, hashes compact tile evidence, and emits Form question/choice receipt proof.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk
observed_results: branch rebased cleanly onto origin/main with autostash reapplied

live Tessera probe returned ok=true, manifest_status=200, embedding_status=206, scale_status=200, byte_count=4096, sha256=cb992c1d4ecd93b3da28bfaa8acdcb17ab1fc46325d5b714bb31ea9028877cb2, tile=grid_0.15_52.05
tessera-external-witness-band.fk source proof -> 67108863 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
tessera-external-witness-band.fk binary artifact proof -> 67108863 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript
local PR guard ready_for_push=True and local_preflight=pass
local_validation.notes: The live carrier checks public anonymous S3, using the GeoTessera v1.1/cambridge 2024 sample tile and hashing only a 4096-byte range to avoid storing or downloading the full embedding tensor by default.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Coherence can now use Tessera as an external witness: a live public probe checks manifest/tile availability, hashes compact range evidence, and the Form proof converts that evidence into question answers plus trace-preserving CHOICE-RECEIPT signatures.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/earth-witness-question.fk form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk

phase_gate.reason: Focused local live probe and Form source/binary proofs passed. CI, rebase, PR, and deploy verification are still pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tessera-external-witness.fk adds source, manifest, tile, byte-range hash, external witness, and receipt bridge cells.
form/form-stdlib/tests/tessera-external-witness-band.fk proves the external witness and answer receipts preserve valid signatures.
scripts/tessera_external_witness_probe.py checks public anonymous S3 and hashes compact returned embedding evidence.
kernels/KERNEL_COMMON_GROUND.md records the Tessera external witness shape beside the Earth witness question feature.
